OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 370 Ellis Street is present. Represented by Ann Rollandi.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Juan Fierros is present.
Attorney Andres Carrillo representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ann Hipshman, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAY-06-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
